verses.text: Topa in kei tungah, “Pai in la patpuan dialkaih khat na lei khit ciangin kawtsak loin teeng in,” hong ci hi
Tua ciangin kei zong Topa' hong gen mah bangin dialkaih khat lei-in ka teeng hi
Topa in a nih veina hong hopih a
“Na kawngah na teen, na dialkaih lei la in. Tho in la Eufratis gunah pai in. Tua lai-ah suanghawm sungah va seel in,” hong ci leuleu hi
Kei zong pai-in Topa' hong sawlna bangin Eufratis gun gei-ah ka seel hi
Tua zawh ni tampi khit ciangin Topa in kei kiangah, “Eufratis gunah va pai in la, na seel dingin ka hong sawl na dialkaih va lakik in,” hong ci hi
Tua ciangin kei zong Eufratis gunah pai-in dialkaih ka seelna mun khuat kikin ka la hi. Dialkaih na ngotgawp khin a, zattheih ding hi nawnlo hi
Tua ciangin Topa in kei hong hopih a
“ Topa in kong cihin-ah, hih bangmahin Judah mite' kisaktheihna leh Jerusalem khuate' ki-uatsaknate ka susia ding hi

Ka thu hong ngai nuamloin amau' ngaihsutna bang bekin a pai tentan nuam, pasian dangte' na a sem ding leh a bia dingin a nung a zui hih migilote pen zattheih ding ahi nawnlo, hih dialkaih bang ahi ding uh hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh dialkaih, mite' kawng tungah a belh cinten mah bangin Israel mi khempeuh leh Judah mi khempeuh kei' tungah a hong belh cinten dingin ka bawl hi. Tua hi leh amaute ka mi hi ding uh a, ka minthan'na, ka hoihna, leh ka vangliatna ding ahi ding uh hi. Ahih hangin amaute in ka thu hong manglo uh hi, Topa in kong ci hi,” hong ci hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Leenggahzu Tawh A Kidim Beelte Tawh Thuhilhna

verses.text: Topa Pasian in kei kiangah, “Jeremiah aw, amau' kiangah, ‘ Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in a hong genin-ah, “Zubeel khempeuh leenggahzu tawh a kidim ding hi,” hong ci hi,’ va ci in. Amaute in nang kiangah, ‘Beel khempeuh leenggahzu tawh kidim ding cih kote in theilo ka hi uh hiam?’ hong ci kik ding uh hi

Tua ciangin nangmah in amaute kiangah, ‘ Topa in hong cihin-ah: En un, David' tokhom tungah a tu kumpite, siampite, kamsangte, leh Jerusalem khua-a a teng mi khempeuh-a kipan gamsungah a om mi khempeuh zu tawh kidim sakin ka khamsak ding hi
Pate leh tate-a kipan amaute khatlekhat ka kiphusak ding a, Topa in kong cihin-ah, hehpihlo, maplo, itloin ka sisak ding hi, ci hi,’ va ci in,” hong ci hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Judah A Kisikkik Lohna Hangin Mat Ding Tawh Tawn'na

verses.text: Ngai-in na bil uh ngat un; kisathei kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in thu a genzo hi
Topa in khua mialsak a, khuamialna mualtungah na tuk ma un, na lamet uh khuavak pen khuamial bikbek a suah ma-in, Topa na Pasian uh pahtawi un
Ahih hangin ka thu nong ngaih kei uh leh na kisaktheihna uh hangin ka kapsim ding a, khitui luangin nakpi takin ka kidik ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa' tuuhonte sal dingin kikaikhia zo hi
Topa in kei kiangah, “Kumpipa leh a nu kiangah, ‘Na kumpi tokhomte tung panun hong tuaksuk un. Bang hang hiam cih leh na kumpi lukhute uh na lu tung uh panin kia khinzo hi,’ va ci in
Negeb gama om khua kongpite lah kikhak a, kuamah lut thei nawnlo hi. Judah mite zong salin kikai a, a vekun sal suak khin uh hi,” hong ci hi
Jerusalem khua aw, khuadak in la, leilu lam panin a hong paite en dih in. Nangmah a hong kipia a hoih mahmah na tuuhonte koi-ah om ahi hiam
Nangma lawm dingin na bawl mite teekteek in nang hong uk ni ciangin bang na ci ding hiam? Numei nausuakte in na a sak velval uh bangin nang zong na na sa ding hi
Bang hangin hih thute kei tungah hong tung ahi hiam, ci-in na ngaihsut leh na mawhna a liatluatna hang ahi hi. Tua thu hangin na nik hong kihawkgawp a, a hong kibuan gawp ahi hi
Ethiopia mivomte in a vun uh khek thei a, kamkei in a gial khek thei ahi hiam? A khek theih uh leh siatna bawl ding a zongsang khin note in zong a hoih na bawl thei ding uh hi
Sehnel gam panin a hong nung huih in buhvai a mut bangin note kong thehthang ding hi
Hih pen nangma ngah dingin ka hong sehsak ahi hi, Topa in kong ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei na hong mangngilh a, pasian zuau peuh na um hi
Keimahmah in na nik kong hawksak ding a, kong maizumsak ding hi

Na kihhuainate, na angkawmna, na hukna leh gamlak mualtungah numei paktat bangin milim pasian peuh na biak kawikawinate ka muzo hi. Jerusalem aw, gimna ngah ta in. Na siangthona dingin bang tanvei sawt ding ahi hiam, a ci hi.
